# Project Init Bootstrap

Run the shared Project Initiation bootstrap workflow for Step 0.

Load `docs/guides/proj-init/00-bootstrap-target-repo.md`, then execute it exactly.

If the file fails to load, halt execution and output: `Error: docs/guides/proj-init/00-bootstrap-target-repo.md could not be loaded. Resolve this before continuing Step 0.`

Do not duplicate or override the shared workflow. `00-bootstrap-target-repo.md` owns the bootstrap workflow, implementation, and rules.
